description_long: This is a robust, double-headed axe with a dark, matte finish and a geometric, faceted blade design. The axe features a long, straight handle that appears to be made of a dense, black material, possibly metal or reinforced composite, with a subtle texture for grip. The head of the axe is symmetrical, with two broad, polygonal blades extending from a central mount, each blade having a beveled edge and a slightly angular profile. A metallic ring or band, likely brass or bronze, secures the head to the handle, adding both structural integrity and a decorative accent. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible engravings or branding, and the construction suggests durability for heavy-duty use. The color palette is predominantly black with metallic highlights, giving the axe a sleek and formidable appearance.
description: A double-headed, black axe with a faceted blade design and a long, straight handle, accented by a metallic ring at the head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow profile of the axe head and the full length of the handle, emphasizing the central mounting and metallic ring.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the double-bladed, polygonal head with beveled edges and the symmetrical design, as well as the handle's attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the axe head, highlighting the geometric facets and the secure mounting to the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other blade and the metallic ring, with clear visibility of the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight handle with a round cross-section, made of black composite or metal, featuring a subtle textured grip and no visible curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, polygonal blades with beveled edges, symmetrical and faceted, no beard or poll, and a modern geometric style.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern mounting with a metallic ring or band securing the blade to the handle, likely press-fit or reinforced.
